paper.title: SRTube: Video-Language Pre-Training with Action-Centric Video Tube Features and Semantic Role Labeling
paper.from_query: semantic video retrieval AND action recognition AND natural language query

llm_screening.Notes: Proposes a method for video-language pre-training focusing on actions and semantic role labeling
llm_screening.Reason of relevance: While it involves CV and NLP, it doesn't directly address our specific task requirements
Top evidence: No explicit mention of retrieval tasks or related metrics.
